global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial still of a single chunky vintage-style desktop calculator sitting on a dark walnut wood surface. The calculator is the only subject — single hero object, dramatic theatrical lighting from a single soft top-light, deep shadow falloff into a near-black background. The calculator's segmented LCD display shows the math equation in dim greenish digital characters: '14,500 - 9,500 = 5,000'. The result '5,000' is the largest, displayed clearly. Beside the calculator, a small printed slip of paper sits at a slight angle, like an annotation, in clean dark sans-serif: 'SAME AC INSTALL.' / 'JUST DIFFERENT MONTHS.' Mood: cold mathematical reveal, the moment a number stops being abstract. Editorial product-shot aesthetic, NOT documentary photo, NOT cartoon — magazine still life with theatrical lighting. Cinematic, dramatic, minimal.

lighting.source: single soft top-light, dramatic falloff to near-black

composition.framing: centered hero object, calculator dominates 60% of frame
composition.focal_point: the calculator's display showing the math equation

objects.label: vintage chunky desktop calculator

micro_details: LCD shows '14,500 - 9,500 = 5,000' — the result '5,000' rendered largest and most prominent on the display
calculator body slightly weathered, faintly patinated
rubber buttons clearly visible — number pad, math operators

objects.text_content: SAME AC INSTALL. JUST DIFFERENT MONTHS.

micro_details: small printed slip of paper, ~3in wide
two lines of bold dark sans-serif: 'SAME AC INSTALL.' on top line, 'JUST DIFFERENT MONTHS.' on bottom line

visual_attributes.color: deep dark walnut grain, fades to near-black at edges of frame
